title: Agent Skill Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter shape for SKILL.md files (Agent Skills specification).

name.description: Skill identifier. Lowercase a-z, 0-9, single hyphens. No leading/trailing/consecutive hyphens. Must equal the parent directory name.

description.description: What the skill does AND when to use it. Imperative phrasing. The single field that determines whether the skill triggers.

license.description: License identifier (SPDX) or path to a bundled license file.

compatibility.description: Environment requirements: target product, system packages, network access, Python version, optional CLIs.

metadata.description: Free-form key/value store. Use unique key names to avoid conflicts.

allowed-tools.description: EXPERIMENTAL. Space-separated list of pre-approved tools. Support varies by client.
